sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'apple banana orange'), (2, 'banana apple peach'), (3, 'grape melon apple');
SELECT id, multiMatchAllIndices(text, ['apple', 'banana']) AS indices FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'apple orange grape' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, multiMatchAllIndices(text, ['peach', 'orange']) AS indices FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE '%apple%';
